mapper.select: SELECT FROM `workflow_node_material_requirement` WHERE `workflow_node_id` = #{workflowNodeId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY `requirement_id`
mapper.update: UPDATE `workflow_node_material_requirement` SET `workflow_node_id` = #{workflowNodeId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `material_type_id` = #{materialTypeId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `requirement_timing` = #{requirementTiming, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `required` = #{required, jdbcType=TINYINT}, `min_count` = #{minCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, `max_count` = #{maxCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, `usage_type` = #{usageType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `validator_key` = #{validatorKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `description` = #{description, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} WHERE `requirement_id` = #{requirementId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
